summary: Comprehensive iteration 2 testing completed with 100% backend tests passed (9/9) and all frontend features verified. All new features working correctly: /api/vod/recent and /api/series/recent endpoints, EPG base64 decoding, redesigned home screen with Hero player, Recently Watched channels, Last Added Movies/Series, Live TV EPG display, and bottom tab bar safe area spacing. Login flow with valid credentials successful. Minor image loading issue due to external server CORS policy (not an app bug).

external_issues.issue: Images from elitewavenetwork.xyz fail to load with ERR_BLOCKED_BY_ORB (Opaque Response Blocking). This is due to Xtream Codes server not providing proper CORS headers, not an app bug. Images would load correctly in native mobile app but blocked by browser security in web preview.

seed_data_creation: No seed data created. Testing performed with valid Xtream Codes credentials (DJBIGANT). Watch history is real data from user interactions.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 2 features tested and working. Backend endpoints for recent VOD/series and EPG decoding work correctly. Home screen redesign with Hero player, Recently Watched, Last Added Movies/Series sections all functional. Live TV displays EPG data (current + next program). Tab bar uses safe area insets and is not covered by phone nav bar. All 5 tabs navigate correctly. AsyncStorage web fallback works without errors. Image loading blocked by external server CORS policy (browser security, not app bug).
